zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry d'Eu II, Count of Eu於1159年出生在英國素可海斯廷斯時，他的父親John d'Eu Count of Eu41歲，母親Alice Albini22歲。他和Matilda de Warenne至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1183年3月16日在法國巴-諾門迪奧內阿倫c多福洛特享年24歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利福卡爾蒙特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry d'Eu II, Count of Eu于1159年出生在英国素可海斯廷斯时，他的父亲John d'Eu Count of Eu41岁，母亲Alice Albini22岁。他和Matilda de Warenne至少有4个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1183年3月16日在法国巴-諾門迪奧內阿倫c多福洛特享年24岁，埋葬在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利福卡爾蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: d'Eu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

variants.name: De
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Day
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English day(e), dey(e) ‘dairyman or dairymaid’. Originally used only of women, it was later used of men with the sense ‘man in charge of the dairy cattle’. This is probably the most common source of the surname.

English: from the Middle English personal name Day(e) or Dey. In western England this is probably a pet form of David , but in northern England and perhaps elsewhere also it is a late Middle English variant of Daw, a pet form of Ralph (see Daw , Dakin ).
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Deaghaidh (see O'Dea ).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry d'Eu II, Count of Eu was born in 1159, in Hastings, Sussex, England, his father, John d'Eu Count of Eu, was 41 and his mother, Alice Albini, was 22. He had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Matilda de Warenne. He died on 16 March 1183, in Domfront, Alençon, Orne, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 24, and was buried in Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry d'Eu II, Count of Eu est né en 1159, à Hastings, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John d'Eu Count of Eu, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alice Albini, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Matilda de Warenne. Il est décédé le 16 mars 1183, à Domfront, Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 24 ans, et a été enterré à Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry d'Eu II, Count of Eu 1159 in Hastings, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John d'Eu Count of Eu 41 und seine Mutter Alice Albini 22. Er hatte mit Matilda de Warenne mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 16. März 1183 im Alter von 24 Jahren in Domfront, Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry d'Eu II, Count of Eu è nato il nel 1159 nel Hastings, Sussex, England, il suo padre, John d'Eu Count of Eu, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Alice Albini, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Matilda de Warenne. Morì il 16 marzo 1183, nel Domfront, Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 24 anni, e fu sepolto a Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry d'Eu II, Count of Euが1159年にイギリススセックスハスティングズで生まれた時，父John d'Eu Count of Euは41歳，母Alice Albiniは22歳であった。彼はMatilda de Warenneとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1183年3月16日にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンアレンcオンドムフロントで24歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメフォウカーモントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry d'Eu II, Count of Eu(이)가 1159년 영국 수세스 하스틴그스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John d'Eu Count of Eu(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Albini(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Matilda de Warenne(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1183년 3월 16일 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 알렌c 돔프론트에서 24세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 포우카몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry d'Eu II, Count of Eu nasceu em 1159, em Hastings, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John d'Eu Count of Eu, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Alice Albini, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Matilda de Warenne. Ele faleceu em 16 de março de 1183, em Domfront, Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França, com 24 anos, e foi sepultado em Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry d'Eu II, Count of Eu родился в 1159 г. в местности хастингс, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John d'Eu Count of Eu было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Albini, 22. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Matilda de Warenne. Он умер 16 марта 1183 г. в местности домфронт, аленcон, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 24 лет и был похоронен в местности фоукармонт, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry d'Eu II, Count of Eu nació en 1159, en Hastings, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John d'Eu Count of Eu, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Alice Albini, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas con Matilda de Warenne. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1183, en Domfront, Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 24 años, y fue sepultado en Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
